extracted_equations.text: \chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt
$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt

= entropy in the human/cosmic system. Plain English: the adversary’s third move switches on the second law inside the human substrate. From that moment forward, decay is the default trajectory of every closed sub-system. Symmetry Requirement of Repair
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
Framework Reference: Theophysics Master Equation χ = ∭(G·M·E·S·T·K·R·Q·F·C) dx dy dt
$$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt$$

claims.text: The Resurrection must be physical because the damage was physical; if Christ's body stayed in the tomb, Row 6 fails and 1 Cor 15:17 applies — "your faith is futile and you are still in your sins."
